zh.Boscastle, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾
zh.Launceston, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾勞斯頓

zh.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux是William de Botreaux和Alice的兒子，於1295年出生在英國可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾。他於大約1330年與Isabella在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年12月21日享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

zh-hans.Boscastle, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾
zh-hans.Launceston, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾勞斯頓

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux是William de Botreaux和Alice的儿子，于1295年出生在英国可瓦爾波斯卡斯特爾。他于大约1330年与Isabella在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年12月21日享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux was born in 1295, in Boscastle, Cornwall, England as the son of William de Botreaux and Alice. He married Isabella about 1330, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 December 1346, at the age of 51, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux est né en 1295, à Boscastle, Cornouailles, Angleterre, fils de William de Botreaux et Alice. Il a épousé Isabella environ 1330, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1346, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux wurde 1295 in Boscastle, Cornwall, England, als Sohn von William de Botreaux und Alice geboren. Er hat um 1330 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Isabella geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1346 im Alter von 51 Jahren und wurde in Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux è nato il nel 1295 nel Boscastle, Cornwall, England come figlio di William de Botreaux e Alice. Lui sposato Isabella circa 1330, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 dicembre 1346, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreauxは1295年にイギリスコルンワルボスカストルでWilliam de BotreauxとAliceの息子として生まれた。約1330年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでIsabellaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年12月21日に51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux(은)는 1295년 영국 코른월 보스카스틀에서 William de Botreaux(와)과 Alice의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Isabella(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 12월 21일 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux nasceu em 1295, em Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra filho de William de Botreaux e Alice. Ele casou-se com Isabella aproximadamente 1330, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1346, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux родился в 1295 г. в местности боскастл, корнвалл, Англия. Его родителей звали William de Botreaux и Alice. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabella около 1330 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 декабря 1346 г. в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Reynold or Reginald de Botreaux nació en 1295, en Boscastle, Cornwall, Inglaterra como hijo de William de Botreaux y Alice. Se casó con Isabella aproximadamente 1330, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1346, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
